Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}All right... If you insist, I'll give you my autograph. It's always a pleasure to meet a fan.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}...Don't you have a television? Are you living in the stone age? How barbaric![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Oh, don't be ridiculous! Never look a gift horse in the mouth.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Oh my... It's so very difficult being famous. I can hardly go anywhere without being recognized.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}I'm sure you've seen the home shopping program Tanaka's Amazing Commodities, yes?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Allow me to introduce myself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The man handed me a business card...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It says, "Tanaka, President & CEO."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}That's right! I'm Tanaka himself. Surely you've heard the name.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}I'm afraid I can't offer any returns on your 40,000 yen, but I've autographed my business card for you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Hold onto that—it'll be worth a pretty penny in a year or so! And with that, I must be going.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}That little brat... Doesn't he realize he's in the presence of a star!?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Time is money—especially mine! I should've squeezed a few more payments out of him...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It sounds like he's talking about me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Huh!? Er— What do you want!? Quit disturbing me! Get out of here, shoo![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Hey! Go away! You're making me nervous! Get out of here, shoo![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}You... You overheard me talking to myself just now, didn't you!?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}You'll forget it ever happened if you know what's good for you. I belong to a powerful talent agency.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}I'm practically a celebrity. I have an image to maintain![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Don't even think about telling someone that I took your money or called you a little brat! Capiche!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}...Blind obedience has a price attached. Better learn that before it bites ya, kiddo.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Don't get cute with me! You think you can get away with anything with that pretty face of yours!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Oh, silly me! I've let you in on my little secret, haven't I? Heh heh heh...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Please! I'll lick your shoes clean if you want me to![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Er— Really? You promise? You better be ready to cross your heart and hope to die if you're lying to me![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}So... you won't tell anyone, right? You better be ready to cross your heart and hope to die if you're lying to me![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}A verbal agreement is a form of contract, and if you breach it I'll sue your pants off![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I've got your adorable little face etched into my memory.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...He seems to have taken an interest in me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'm now acquainted with Tanaka, the[n]producer of a home shopping TV show...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}You're a diamond in the rough, my boy. All you need is a little polishing, and you'll sparkle.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I often take my breaks here. I'd be happy to mold your young mind whenever you wish.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After parting ways with President Tanaka,[n]I decided to return to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_024_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I parted ways with President Tanaka.[n]I should show Elizabeth this autograph[n]when I have the chance...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}For now, I'll return to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
